title: 3 BHK Flat in Sector 168, Noida
key_highlights: Fitness Center/ Gym, Club house, Swimming Pool Available, Rain Water Harvesting
about:
I would like to sell my 3 bhk + servant registered flat of 1955 sqft area which i am using myself and built with best quality materials. 
Some key highlights of the flats are:
Most important - All balconies (Except 1 room ) faces east so you get the best morning sunlight in all rooms, living, kitchen as well. 
- Wood work done in bedrooms , bathrooms & drawing room ( Bar & tv unit ) is done in sirca italian pu finish ( This is most expensive pu product available in india )
- All profile lights & adaptors are of havells 256 led/m
- All wardrobes have profile lights added ( Opened 1 for display ), you open any door & it will lit up, also additional on/off switch is given.
- The hardware used in the premium hattic german for all furniture. 
- Entrance lobby of flat side is is designed with louvers & lights are also added to highlight 
- All door & polished again as builder's quality was not good
- Drawing room false ceiling design in enhanced by integrating profile lights directly in ceiling to maintain height & looks both. 
- Tv units are made in living as well as bedrooms.
- Png connection & direct govt electric meter, we also have 4kv dg load. 
- 1 covered parking 

Price is not much negotiable as i am already listing at very reasonable price for the kind of work we have done. You can start living with almost no additional changes.
